question_frequency.rationale: The Pair asks zero didactic questions. It delivers the full solution with explanation upfront, leaving no room for the student to discover anything.

question_quality.rationale: No questions are posed. The 'why last_seen[char] >= left' is presented as exposition rather than a Socratic prompt.

scaffolding.rationale: No scaffolding exists — the solution, walkthrough, edge case, and complexity are all dumped in a single message with full spoilers.

flow_and_tone.rationale: Tone is clear and well-organized, but the conversation is one-sided: the Pair lectures, the student self-verifies and exits. No real back-and-forth.

effectiveness.rationale: Final code is correct and equivalent to baseline — same sliding window with last_seen guard, O(n) time.

friction.rationale: Resolved in a single turn (~22s) versus baseline's two turns. Tighter than baseline, though with no pedagogical gain to justify it.
